author: sproul
content: nice lib! I tried it with Lighthouse and it seems competitive with our current schema. Fable found a few sharp edges during the integration, some might be worth fixing for the general case: <https://github.com/galadd/eth_state_diff/issues/1>.

author: gbolahan
content: Thank you for testing it and the feedback! I'll look into it now. I also like the numbers I am seeing
